arts.ttl: Leeds United's Patrick Bamford fitness boost and Daniel Farke's Middlesbrough verdict
arts.sum: But in poor form of late after just one win in their last six games, they have been hit by injuries to defender Pascal Struijk and midfielder Joe Rothwell. Like Boro, it leaves Leeds short on defensive options, with Farke assessing his defensive options ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Middlesbrough with two players absent amid Mateo Joseph boost
arts.sum: Ilia Gruev, Brenden Aaronson and Patrick Bamford are pushing for places, with the Whites manager likely to rotate his squad after Saturday's disappointing draw at Luton Town. Daniel Farke is contemplating making changes to his Leeds United starting line-up as they go in search of a first win on the road since February 24.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Middlesbrough vs. Leeds
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Middlesbrough vs. Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leaked details and rumours of the Leeds United 2025/26 home, away and third kit
arts.sum: Leaked details of the 2025/26 Leeds United shirts have been doing the rounds online, with Adidas reportedly taking inspiration from a surprising place while bringing back some classic LUFC colours . Unsurprising and perhaps a relief for many fans, next season's home shirt will once again be white, although in a move away from the clean and classic designs seen in recent years, the kit may include some surprising splashes of colour.

arts.ttl: Ryan Giles 'impact' message as Samuel Iling-Junior thrives for Middlesbrough in his role
arts.sum: In the meantime, it’s Samuel Iling-Junior who has stepped up and claimed the left-back role for himself, after Giles was hooked at half-time of his most recent start at Swansea City. Michael Carrick has told Ryan Giles he can still play a really important role for Middlesbrough this season, with just six games remaining.

arts.ttl: James Wilson learning harsh Hearts lesson as old head who's been there and done it offers advice
arts.sum: Wilson was shown a straight red for a lunge on Dundee Utd' Luca Stephenson but Craig Gordon is sure teen will bounce back

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Leeds United make the trip up to Teesside on Tuesday night to face Middlesbrough, with six games left in the Championship season and the Whites outside the top two for the first time since November. Leeds United predicted XI to face Middlesbrough

arts.ttl: Potential Boro line-up for Leeds United as Neto Borges injury changes plans
arts.sum: DC - Jonny Howson - It feels like no coincidence that in the four games he’s started since returning from his recent injury, Boro are undefeated. Unlikely to be fit to start though, it likely rules out Michael Carrick being able to operate with a back three, which he might have considered for this one, having switched to the formation for both games last season against Leicester City.

arts.ttl: 9-man Middlesbrough injury crisis revealed ahead of Leeds United clash
arts.sum: Carrick’s Middlesbrough will pose big threat to Leeds United – ding-dong battle awaits What awaits Leeds is a visit to Middlesbrough, who currently sit joint-top of the form table in the last four games, with three wins and a draw under Michael Carrick.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke lays down the law to Largie Ramazani after private Leeds United chat
arts.sum: Daniel Farke says he has reminded Largie Ramazani of the “non-negotiables” when it comes to playing for his side and has told the Leeds United winger to show more reliability if he is to earn more minutes. “If the player who comes in with fresh legs covers less distance - not in total but in metres-per-minute - this is not what you want to have.
